text:
Created attachment 221827
pngcheck-3.0.0.patch

* Update to 3.0.0
* Changed MASTERSITE as 3.0.0 does not exist on Sourceforge
* Cleanup Makefile with tips from portclippy and portfmt
* Take maintainership
* Update distinfo

Changelog: http://www.libpng.org/pub/png/src/pngcheck-3.0.0.CHANGELOG

Tested in poudriere for 11-i386, 11-amd64, 12-i386 and 12-amd64. Passes portlint.
